chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-983 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. 1. For orders on M.A. No.3603/2022. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.3604/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 30.03.2022 Mr. Wahid Bux Aajiz Laghari, advocate for petitioner. == The petitioner, by way of instant petition has sought for directions against the respondents to appoint him in local bodies on deceased quota basis as his father being employee of Municipal Committee Tando Muhammad Khan died during service in year 1988. No provision of law is referred by learned counsel for the petitioner which may make the petitioner entitled for his appointment in local bodies on deceased quota basis. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the late father of the petitioner was a civil servant then the policy to make appointment of family members of the late employees, on deceased quota basis was introduced in year 2002, it was much after death of father of the petitioner; therefore, such policy could not be enforced retrospectively by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction; consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly in limine together with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
